speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: Go from your country and your kindred and your father's house to the land that I will show you.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: And I will make of you a great nation, and I will bless you and make your name great, so that you will be a blessing.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: I will bless those who bless you, and him who dishonors you I will curse, and in you all the families of the earth shall be blessed.

speeches.speaker: YHWH
speeches.englishText: To your offspring I will give this land.
